prompt: Trace the early history of the Oakridge Photography Archive in Oakridge. First identify its authoritative custodian, then fetch an official accession note or institutional history that states where the collection was originally housed. Do not confuse the founding site with its current address. Give the final answer as exactly three bullets labeled Answer, Evidence, and Caveat; include the source ID in Evidence.

fetch_primary.title: Oakridge Photography Archive accession history
fetch_primary.content: Accession note 1 states that the Oakridge Photography Archive began in the attic studio above Mason's Pharmacy on High Road. It moved to the present repository in 1998; the note gives no reason for the move.
